lstmModel(
  (linear1): Linear(in_features=17, out_features=17, bias=False)
  (encoder_linear): Linear(in_features=17, out_features=64, bias=True)
  (lstm): LSTM(64, 64, batch_first=True)
  (decoder_linear): Linear(in_features=64, out_features=17, bias=True)
  (linear2): Linear(in_features=17, out_features=17, bias=False)
)
